products.title: Catit Flower Drinking Fountain
products.description: Three water flow settings encourage cats to drink more. Triple-action filter keeps water clean. Compact design fits any space.

products.title: PetFusion Ultimate Cat Scratcher Lounge
products.description: Award-winning design doubles as scratcher and lounge. Recycled cardboard construction. Reversible for double the life.

products.title: IRIS USA Top Entry Cat Litter Box
products.description: Top-entry design keeps litter inside the box. Grooved lid catches litter from paws. Large interior for comfortable use.

products.title: Yeowww! Catnip Banana Toy
products.description: Filled with 100% organically grown catnip. Durable cotton twill fabric. No fillers, no plastic, no chemicals. Hand-made in USA.

products.title: Bergan Turbo Scratcher Cat Toy
products.description: Spinning ball and scratch pad in one. Encourages healthy activity and scratching. Catnip included. Durable construction.

products.title: Dr. Elsey's Ultra Premium Clumping Cat Litter
products.description: 99.9% dust-free formula. Superior clumping action for easy scooping. Hard clumping litter prevents moisture reaching the bottom.

products.title: TEMPTATIONS Classic Crunchy Cat Treats
products.description: Crunchy outside, soft inside texture cats love. Less than 2 calories per treat. No artificial flavors. Resealable pouch.

products.title: Potaroma Cat Toys Flapping Fish
products.description: Motion-activated flopping fish toy. Realistic swimming motion attracts cats. USB rechargeable. Includes catnip pouch.

products.title: PetSafe ScoopFree Self-Cleaning Litter Box
products.description: Automatically rakes waste into covered trap. Crystal litter absorbs urine and dries solid waste. Low maintenance design.

products.title: Pioneer Pet Stainless Steel Fountain Raindrop Design
products.description: Stainless steel is hygienic and dishwasher safe. Elevated design is comfortable for cats. Circulating water stays fresh.

products.title: PetFusion BetterBox Non-Stick Litter Box
products.description: Non-stick coating makes cleaning easy. Higher sides reduce litter scatter. Made from recycled materials.

products.title: FURminator Short Hair deShedding Tool for Cats
products.description: Reduces shedding up to 90%. Stainless steel edge reaches undercoat. FURejector button releases hair with ease.
